ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated August 21, 1986 is admitted to probate. Edward A. Janne is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
